title: Biome Sniffer
description: A small mod to make the Sniffer's texture change according to the biome they're in.
body: # Biome Sniffer A small mod to make the Sniffer's texture change according to the biome they're in. ## Showcase If installed only on the **client**, Sniffers will change their textures dynamically depending on what biome they're on. If installed on the **server**, Sniffers will keep their texture according to the biome they spawned on. (Can be changed on the config) ## Resource Pack Support The mod dynamically changes the green parts of the Sniffer's texture, to the current biome's foliage hue. Any resource packs that keep the contrast between the green parts of the texture and the other parts, should work automatically. ## Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/biome-sniffer](https://github.com/lucaargolo/biome-sniffer) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
